output.formatted:
Houston Astros

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q7520466 ; rdfs:label ?eventLabel ; wdt:P580 ?startDate ; wdt:P128 ?winner .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?eventLabel)) , 'american league championship series 2017'))
  FILTER(YEAR(?startDate) = 2017)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = "en")
  }
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 2 columns
